title: WIP Tracking System In-depth Review: Fishbowl vs Katana MRP vs MRPeasy 2026 Comparison
description: Comprehensive comparison of three major WIP tracking systems in 2026: Fishbowl, Katana MRP, and MRPeasy. In-depth analysis covering WIP monitoring, production tracking, inventory management, and production visualization. Helps manufacturers select the most suitable WIP tracking solution. Learn more about feature and pricing comparisons to find the best solution for your needs! Professional review to guide your decision!
author: Production Tracking Management Expert
content:
Background Introduction

WIP tracking is a core process for manufacturers' production control, directly impacting production cycle times, inventory costs, and order delivery. Traditional manufacturer WIP tracking relies on manual recording and work orders, with delayed WIP information, unclear production progress, and difficult bottleneck process identification, with average WIP cycle times reaching 15 days and WIP inventory accounting for 5-10% of revenue. Research shows that after deploying WIP tracking systems, WIP cycle times shorten to 5-7 days, WIP inventory reduces to 2-3% of revenue, and order delivery rates improve to 95%. This article provides an in-depth comparison of Fishbowl, Katana MRP, and MRPeasy, three major WIP tracking systems, helping manufacturers make informed WIP tracking software selection decisions.

Core Feature Comparison

Feature ModuleFishbowlKatana MRPMRPeasyComparison Analysis
WIP MonitoringWIP real-time monitoring completeWIP visual monitoringWIP tracking managementAll three WIP monitoring are complete
Production TrackingProduction progress tracking completeProduction order trackingProduction work order trackingAll three production tracking are complete

Production VisualizationProduction visualization dashboardProduction visualizationProduction progress visualizationFishbowl visualization most comprehensive

User ExperienceUser-friendlyModern interfaceBest ease of useMRPeasy best ease of use

Fishbowl WIP Tracking System In-depth Review

Fishbowl is a small to medium manufacturer inventory and WIP tracking solution, with deep QuickBooks integration. WIP real-time monitoring functionality includes real-time monitoring of work-in-process, process progress, and WIP time, with visual WIP status dashboard. Production progress tracking functionality includes tracking production order progress, process status, and production time statistics. Inventory management functionality includes managing material inventory, finished goods inventory, and WIP inventory, supporting inventory optimization. Production visualization dashboard functionality includes visualizing production order status, WIP quantities, and process progress, supporting production monitoring. Material batch tracking functionality includes tracking material batch, material consumption, and material traceability, supporting quality traceability. Production order management functionality includes managing production orders, assignment, execution, and completion process. Cost-effectiveness high with annual license fee starting at $2K, suitable for budget-conscious small to medium enterprises. User-friendly interface with fast deployment. Fishbowl annual license fee starting at $2K, suitable for manufacturers with annual revenue $1M to $5M.

  • WIP real-time monitoring: Real-time WIP status visualization
  • Production visualization dashboard: Production order progress visualization
  • Inventory management most comprehensive: Material and WIP inventory
  • QuickBooks integration: QuickBooks deep integration
  • Cost-effectiveness high: Annual license fee starting at $2K

Katana MRP WIP Tracking Review

Katana MRP is a modern manufacturer MRP and WIP tracking solution. WIP visual monitoring functionality includes visual work-in-process, process progress, and WIP quantities, supporting WIP monitoring. Production order tracking functionality includes tracking production order progress, work order execution status, and production time statistics. Material inventory management functionality includes managing material inventory, automatically calculating material demand, and optimizing material allocation. Production visualization functionality includes visualizing production order status and process progress. Material tracking functionality includes tracking material batch, material consumption, and material traceability. Order tracking management functionality includes managing orders and production order tracking. Cost-effectiveness medium with annual license fee starting at $3K, suitable for medium enterprises. Modern interface with cloud deployment. Katana MRP annual license fee starting at $3K, suitable for manufacturers with annual revenue $2M to $10M.

  • WIP visual monitoring: WIP visual dashboard
  • Material inventory management: Automatic material demand calculation
  • Modern interface: Modern user experience
  • Cloud deployment: Cloud deployment fast
  • Suitable for medium enterprises: Annual revenue $2M to $10M

MRPeasy WIP Tracking System Review

MRPeasy is an MRP and WIP tracking solution for small to medium manufacturers. WIP tracking management functionality includes tracking work-in-process, process progress, and WIP time. Production work order tracking functionality includes tracking production work order progress and work order execution status. Inventory tracking management functionality includes managing material inventory, finished goods inventory, and WIP inventory. Production progress visualization functionality includes visualizing production work order status and process progress. Material tracking functionality includes tracking material batch and material consumption. Order tracking functionality includes tracking orders and production order progress. Cost-effectiveness highest with annual license fee starting at $1K, making it the most cost-effective WIP tracking solution. Best ease of use with fast deployment and shortest learning curve. MRPeasy annual license fee starting at $1K, suitable for small to medium manufacturers with annual revenue $500K to $5M.

  • Cost-effectiveness highest: Annual license fee starting at $1K
  • Best ease of use: Fast deployment
  • WIP tracking management: WIP progress tracking
  • Production progress visualization: Work order status visualization
  • Suitable for small to medium enterprises: Annual revenue $500K to $5M

Price and Application Scenario Comparison

MRPeasy$1KWIP tracking managementSmall to medium enterprisesInventory tracking managementCost-effectiveness highest

Manufacturer Selection Recommendations

Manufacturer WIP tracking software selection requires comprehensive consideration of WIP monitoring needs, inventory management demands, and enterprise scale. For manufacturers with annual revenue $1M to $5M using QuickBooks systems, we recommend Fishbowl with inventory management most comprehensive and QuickBooks integration friendly. For manufacturers with annual revenue $2M to $10M pursuing modern interface and cloud deployment, we recommend Katana MRP with modern interface advantages. For small to medium manufacturers with annual revenue $500K to $5M with limited budget, we recommend MRPeasy with highest cost-effectiveness and best ease of use. Regardless of which WIP system is chosen, manufacturers should emphasize WIP real-time monitoring and production visualization, continuously shortening WIP cycle times and reducing WIP inventory.

2026 Development Trend Prediction

WIP tracking systems in 2026 will show four major development trends. First, IoT WIP tracking will proliferate, with IoT sensors real-time collecting WIP data, real-time monitoring WIP status, and warning of WIP anomalies, shortening WIP tracking response time to real-time. Second, AI WIP optimization will emerge, with AI-based WIP optimization automatically optimizing WIP configuration, reducing WIP inventory, and shortening WIP cycle times. Third, WIP digital twins will become standard, building virtual WIP models to simulate WIP changes, optimize WIP strategies, and forecast WIP cycle times. Fourth, AR WIP visualization will proliferate, with AR visualizing work-in-process, process progress, and production bottlenecks, improving WIP visualization capability. Manufacturers should pay attention to these trends, choosing systems supporting IoT tracking, AI optimization, and AR visualization.

cons: Inventory management less complete than Fishbowl

pros: Suitable for small to medium enterprises

faq.question: How does WIP tracking systems shorten production cycle times?
faq.answer: WIP systems real-time monitor work-in-process, identify WIP bottleneck processes, optimize WIP configuration, and reduce WIP time. Research shows that after deploying WIP systems, average WIP cycle time shortens from 15 days to 5-7 days. Fishbowl WIP real-time monitoring is most comprehensive.

faq.question: What is the value of production visualization?
faq.answer: Production visualization visualizes production order status, process progress, and WIP quantities, quickly identifying production bottlenecks and warning of production anomalies. Production visualization improves production monitoring efficiency. Fishbowl production visualization dashboard is most comprehensive.

faq.question: How should manufacturers choose WIP systems?
faq.answer: For annual revenue $1M to $5M manufacturers using QuickBooks, we recommend Fishbowl. For annual revenue $2M to $10M manufacturers pursuing modern interface, we recommend Katana MRP. For annual revenue $500K to $5M manufacturers with budget constraints, we recommend MRPeasy. Selection requires comprehensive consideration of WIP needs, inventory demands, and enterprise scale.

faq.question: What is the importance of inventory management?
faq.answer: Inventory management manages material, WIP, and finished goods inventory, automatically calculating inventory demand, optimizing inventory configuration, and reducing inventory backlog. Fishbowl inventory management functionality is most comprehensive, supporting inventory optimization.

faq.question: How does WIP monitoring help enterprises?
faq.answer: WIP monitoring real-time monitors work-in-process, process progress, and WIP time, identifying WIP bottleneck processes and warning of WIP anomalies. All three systems support WIP monitoring, with Fishbowl WIP real-time monitoring most comprehensive.
